No RSS/Atom declaration was found. Use this documentation announcement page rather than the product homepage.

sources.existing_project_coverage: adapter_available: no existing HubSpot source; generic public page adapter patterns exist.
sources.verification_notes: The HubSpot AI page redirects to the Breeze AI product page and links to official Spotlight/Product Updates, Blog, and Case Studies. Spotlight is the best long-term monitoring entry because it contains AI, Breeze, Sales Hub, Service Hub, CRM, and Customer Agent updates with lower noise than the broad blog. The case-study RSS is valid but broad and not AI-specific, while Spotlight has no RSS declaration.
